components.name: Header
components.description: Fixed global top bar. Hosts the brand mark, primary nav buttons, and utility ActionIcons (theme toggle, settings, docs).

variants.name: default
variants.description: Slate fill in both themes. 56px tall, full viewport width.
variants.mock_html:
Prometheus
QueryAlertsStatus
●●

dos_and_donts.text: Keep the header background constant across themes — it is a brand anchor.
Add additional nav buttons to the header; route secondary navigation through the Dropdown Menu.

accessibility.aria_labels: Wrap in <header role='banner'>. Each utility ActionIcon has aria-label.
accessibility.keyboard: Tab cycles brand → nav buttons → utility icons. No custom keyboard trap.
accessibility.contrast: Inverted text on slate passes WCAG AA at 14px.

components.code_example:
Prometheus
…

components.name: Navbar
components.description: The three top-level nav buttons inside the header — Query, Alerts, Status. Active state uses solid brand-blue fill; inactive is transparent with light-gray text.

variants.name: active
variants.description: Current route — solid brand-blue fill, white label.

variants.name: inactive
variants.description: Transparent background, light-gray label. Hover lightens label.

dos_and_donts.text: Render exactly one active button at a time, matching the current top-level route.
Use Navbar styling outside the header — in-page section nav should use Tab Control instead.

accessibility.aria_labels: Use <a> with aria-current='page' on the active route, not a visual-only class.
accessibility.keyboard: Standard link semantics; focus ring inherits brand-blue.

components.name: Dropdown Menu
components.description: Mantine Menu that opens from the Status nav button. Two section-labeled groups: 'Monitoring status' and 'Server status', each with icon+label menu items.

variants.name: default
variants.description: Floating panel with two <menu> groups separated by a section label.
variants.mock_html:
Monitoring status
Target health
Rule health
Server status
Runtime & Build
TSDB status

dos_and_donts.text: Group related items under a labeled section when a menu exceeds 4 items.
Nest dropdowns — flatten the route tree instead.

accessibility.aria_labels: Menu items use role='menuitem'. Section label uses role='presentation'.
accessibility.keyboard: Arrow keys navigate items, Escape closes, Enter activates.

components.name: Breadcrumb
components.description: On Status sub-pages, the active Navbar button expands to 'Status › Target health' style trail. Rendered inside the same header slot as the Status button, not as a dedicated breadcrumb region.

variants.name: default
variants.description: Two-segment trail. Parent segment is the Status nav button; child segment is the current page name.

dos_and_donts.text: Use only on level-2 routes under Status. Level-1 routes render the plain Navbar active state.
Exceed two trail segments — Prometheus routes are not deep.

accessibility.aria_labels: Wrap trail in <nav aria-label='breadcrumb'>; separators are aria-hidden.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Solid brand-blue button for the single most important action on a page. 'Execute' on /query is the canonical instance.

variants.name: default
variants.description: Brand-blue fill, white label, 14px semi-bold.

dos_and_donts.text: One primary button per view — the single action the page is designed around.
Use primary styling for destructive actions. Destructive actions need their own red variant (not yet defined).

accessibility.contrast: White on brand-blue passes AA for 14px bold body.
accessibility.keyboard: Enter/Space activate; focus ring inherits brand-blue.

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Lower-emphasis variant. Transparent background with brand-blue label. 'Add query' on /query is the canonical instance.

variants.name: default
variants.description: Transparent-ish bg, blue label, 14px medium.

dos_and_donts.text: Pair with Primary Button for a +1 add-another affordance.
Mix more than two secondary buttons inline — the row loses a reading order.

accessibility.contrast: Brand-blue text on white passes AA.

components.name: Icon Button
components.description: Mantine ActionIcon. In the header uses a gray fill; in content areas uses a transparent fill with a colored glyph. Used for theme toggle, settings, docs, burger, collapse-all, copy-code, time-scrub arrows, and query options.

variants.name: header
variants.description: Solid gray fill on header slate.

variants.name: content
variants.description: Transparent background, inherits icon color.

dos_and_donts.text: Always provide aria-label — icon-only buttons are invisible to screen readers without one.
Pack more than 3 Icon Buttons in a row without spacing; they blur into a toolbar strip.

accessibility.aria_labels: Required. Describe the action, not the icon.

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Expression editor input on /query — CodeMirror-backed single-line field with leading options menu and trailing Execute slot.

variants.name: default
variants.description: Full-width, brand-blue focus ring, monospaced expression text.

dos_and_donts.text: Use monospace for expression-like content so autocomplete and suggestions align to character columns.
Hide the Execute action behind Enter only — keep the visible suffix button for discoverability.

accessibility.keyboard: Enter executes; Cmd/Ctrl+Enter also supported in CodeMirror.

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Leading-icon text input used for client-side filtering. 'Filter by rule name or labels', 'Filter by endpoint or labels', 'Filter by flag name or value'.

variants.name: default
variants.description: Search-icon affix, placeholder text.
variants.mock_html: ⌕Filter by labels

dos_and_donts.text: Write the placeholder as an instruction: 'Filter by <entity> or labels'.
Ship two unlabeled search inputs on the same page — a user cannot tell which one filters what.

accessibility.aria_labels: Mirror the placeholder as aria-label or use a visible <label>.

components.name: Filter Input (Pills)
components.description: Multi-select filter built on Mantine PillsInput + Combobox. Selected values render as pills inside the field; placeholder shows when empty. Used for 'Filter by rule group state' and 'Filter by rule health'.

variants.name: empty
variants.description: Placeholder visible, no pills.
variants.mock_html: Filter by rule group state

variants.name: with-pills
variants.description: Selected values shown as removable pills.

dos_and_donts.text: Use pills for multi-select enumerations where the count is bounded (state, health, color).
Use pills for free-text — free-text should use Search Input.

accessibility.keyboard: Backspace removes last pill; Tab exits field.

components.name: Select
components.description: Mantine Combobox/Select — single-value picker with trailing chevron. Used for 'Select scrape pool' on /targets and /service-discovery.

variants.name: default
variants.description: Single-value select with trailing chevron.

dos_and_donts.text: Use for fixed enumerations of 5–50 items.
Use for 3 items or fewer — Tab Control reads better.

accessibility.aria_labels: Associate with <label> or aria-label; support native keyboard selection.

components.name: Date Picker
components.description: Mantine DateTimePicker for /query evaluation time, flanked by previous/next ActionIcons for fast stepping.

variants.name: default
variants.description: Field with calendar popover + time picker; arrow icons on either side.

dos_and_donts.text: Expose previous/next Icon Buttons for temporal fields — scrubbing is more common than arbitrary date entry.
Bury the time picker behind a second click on /query — evaluation time is the primary control.

accessibility.keyboard: Arrow keys move the focused date; Enter commits.

components.name: Tab Control
components.description: Mantine Tabs — flat, underline-style. /query's Table / Graph / Explain. Active tab has a 2px brand-blue underline; inactive tabs are underline-transparent.

variants.name: default
variants.description: Inline tab bar. Underline indicates the active pane.

dos_and_donts.text: Use for 2–5 parallel views of the same data.
Use for navigation between routes — that's Navbar.

accessibility.keyboard: Arrow keys move focus; Enter/Space activate.

components.name: Card
components.description: Mantine Card surface. 1px gray border, 4px radius, 16px padding, subtle 2-layer drop-shadow. Container for Build/Runtime info, Alertmanager lists, TSDB stats, and the Flags table.

variants.name: default
variants.description: White surface, light gray border, elevation/card shadow.

dos_and_donts.text: Wrap every page-level data block in a Card so pages share an outer shape.
Ship title-less Cards on /flags and Card-less content on /config — see INC-005.

components.name: Card Title with Icon
components.description: Card heading with a leading Tabler icon. Used on /status ('Build information', 'Runtime information') and /alertmanager-discovery ('Active Alertmanagers', 'Dropped Alertmanagers'). Canonical treatment.

variants.name: default
variants.description: 20px tabler icon + heading/card-title text.

dos_and_donts.text: Use as the default. Icons act as per-card scan anchors on pages with multiple stacked cards.
Pair two different icons for the same concept across pages.

accessibility.aria_labels: Icon is decorative (aria-hidden); the heading text carries the meaning.

components.name: Card Title without Icon
components.description: Plain-text card heading used on /tsdb-status — 'TSDB Head Status', 'Top 10 label names…'. Non-canonical; should migrate to Card Title with Icon.

variants.name: default
variants.description: heading/card-title text, no icon.

dos_and_donts.text: Use new. Four stacked plain-text cards blur together — add an icon per card.
Migrate each instance to Card Title with Icon and pick a tabler glyph that reflects the content.

components.code_example: <CardTitle>TSDB Head Status</CardTitle>  // deprecated — use CardTitle with icon

components.name: Accordion
components.description: Mantine Accordion per scrape pool. Each item has a 5px-solid colored left border — green when all children are UP, red when any child is DOWN. Control row shows pool name, 'N/M up' counter, Status Indicator dot, chevron.

variants.name: ok
variants.description: All targets UP — green left border.
variants.mock_html: demo3/3 up▾

variants.name: error
variants.description: Any target DOWN — red left border.
variants.mock_html: prometheus1/2 up▾

dos_and_donts.text: Surface aggregate health in two places: colored border AND the 'N/M up' counter.
Rely on color alone — the Status Indicator dot and counter make the state readable without color.

accessibility.aria_labels: Each Accordion.Control has aria-expanded; header label conveys state in text.
accessibility.keyboard: Enter/Space toggle; arrow keys move between panels.

components.name: Status Indicator
components.description: Small ~16px SVG circle next to a pool-level 'N/M up' counter. Filled green (ok) or red (error). Pure visual — no text.

variants.name: ok
variants.description: Green solid circle.

variants.name: error
variants.description: Red solid circle.

dos_and_donts.text: Always pair with a text counter or label — color alone is inaccessible.
Use as the only state affordance; pair with Health Status Badge or counter text.

accessibility.aria_labels: aria-hidden on the dot. State is announced via adjacent text.

components.name: Health Status Badge
components.description: Pill-shaped UP / DOWN badge. UP = green.1 bg / green.8 text (light); swapped in dark. DOWN = red family. Uppercase, bold.

variants.name: ok
variants.description: Green pill, 'UP' text.

variants.name: error
variants.description: Red pill, 'DOWN' text.

dos_and_donts.text: Use for every boolean/enum state field app-wide — UP/DOWN, Successful/Failed, Ready/Unhealthy.
Render 'Successful' / 'Failed' as plain black text — see INC-002.

accessibility.contrast: Green.8 on green.1 passes AA for bold 11px; swapped dark pairs also pass.
accessibility.screen_reader: Text content reads correctly — no extra ARIA needed.

components.name: Label Badge
components.description: Pill-shaped key=value badge for labels. Gray bg / dark text (light theme); inverted in dark. Not uppercased. Used on /targets, /service-discovery for label display.

variants.name: default
variants.description: Gray pill; renders full label text including quotes.

dos_and_donts.text: Use for every label, flag, and identifier site-wide — replace bare <code> on /tsdb-status and /flags.
Mix Label Badge with bare <code> for the same concept on different pages — see INC-003.

components.name: Stats Badge
components.description: Gray pill with a leading icon used for 'last scrape' duration and 'N ms ago' timestamps. Same palette as Label Badge.

variants.name: default
variants.description: Gray pill with icon + mixed-case numeric content.

dos_and_donts.text: Set text-transform: none at the root so intent matches output — see INC-009.
Inherit uppercase from the generic Badge default; the inner label overrides it anyway.

accessibility.aria_labels: Leading icon is decorative; the numeric text carries the meaning.

components.name: Table
components.description: Mantine Table used on /status and /tsdb-status. 14px th (bold) + 14px td, 7px 10px cell padding, visible bottom border between rows.

variants.name: default
variants.description: Two+-column table with bold header row.

dos_and_donts.text: Default to sortable — match the /flags treatment (see INC-004).
Ship two tables with identical shape but different interaction affordances.

accessibility.screen_reader: Use <thead>/<tbody> correctly. Provide <caption> or aria-label for the purpose.

components.name: Sortable Table
components.description: Variant of Table with up/down chevron icons stacked in each <th>. Clicking the header sorts. Currently only on /flags.

variants.name: default
variants.description: Each header cell has stacked sort chevrons.

dos_and_donts.text: Promote Sortable Table to the default so /tsdb-status Top-N tables gain sort too.
Hide sortability behind a prop users have to opt into per column.

accessibility.keyboard: Enter/Space on a focused th toggles the sort.

components.name: Key-Value Table
components.description: Two-column table with a bold label column and a value column. Used for Build/Runtime info (system fields) and Top-N label stats (monospace fields).

variants.name: default
variants.description: Bold label column, regular value column.

dos_and_donts.text: Right-align numeric values for readability in Top-N tables.
Sort key-value tables alphabetically — the source order carries meaning (build → runtime).

accessibility.screen_reader: Use <th scope='row'> on the key cells so screen readers announce 'Version: 3.0.0'.

components.name: Inline Code
components.description: Bare <code> inside table cells on /tsdb-status and /flags. Currently browser-default monospace with no bg/padding/border. Should migrate to a Label Badge or adopt the canonical mono stack from INC-008.

variants.name: default
variants.description: Unstyled <code> — monospace text, no surrounding chrome.

dos_and_donts.text: Bind to the canonical --font-family-mono stack — fixes INC-008 on every page at once.
Use bare <code> for label-like identifiers — use Label Badge instead (INC-003).

components.name: YAML Code Block
components.description: Mantine CodeHighlight rendering the Prometheus YAML config on /config. 16px mono, transparent bg in light / dark bg in dark.

variants.name: default
variants.description: Syntax-highlighted YAML with a floating copy button.
variants.mock_html:
global:
  scrape_interval: 15s
scrape_configs:
  - job_name: 'demo'

dos_and_donts.text: Wrap in a Card for consistent page-chrome — see INC-005.
Rely on the bare 'monospace' CSS keyword — see INC-008.

accessibility.aria_labels: Copy Button carries aria-label; the pre is readable via Tab navigation.

components.name: Syntax Highlighted Code
components.description: highlight.js tokenization over YAML. Keys (hljs-attr) and string literals (hljs-string) — today these colors swap semantic meaning between light and dark themes (INC-006).

variants.name: light
variants.description: hljs-attr = green, hljs-string = blue, hljs-literal = blue.

variants.name: dark
variants.description: hljs-attr = blue, hljs-string = green — swap must be eliminated.

specs.value: attr = green family, string = blue family, literal = brand-blue

dos_and_donts.text: Keep role-to-hue stable across themes — vary luminance, not hue (INC-006).
Ship the default highlight.js dark stylesheet unchanged — audit each token role.

accessibility.contrast: All four token colors pass AA on their respective backgrounds after INC-006 remediation.

components.name: Copy Button
components.description: Mantine ActionIcon pinned top-right of a code block. aria-label='Copy code'. Inherits Icon Button chrome.

variants.name: default
variants.description: Transparent ActionIcon with clipboard glyph.

dos_and_donts.text: Give immediate visual feedback on click (icon swap or toast) so users trust the copy happened.
Ship a Copy Button on /config without one on /flags — flag values are the most-copied strings in the app.

accessibility.aria_labels: Required: 'Copy code'. Announce success via aria-live after copy.

components.name: Mantine Alert Info Callout
components.description: Mantine Alert with color='blue'. Translucent brand-blue background, brand-blue icon and title, body in primary text color. Used for info callouts and as the visual shell of Empty States.

variants.name: default
variants.description: Info Alert with leading circle-info icon.
variants.mock_html:
ℹ
No data queried yet
Enter a PromQL expression to begin.

dos_and_donts.text: Use body copy to add new information beyond the title — don't restate the title (INC-001).
Ship identical empty-state copy on /alerts and /rules — specify the rule type (INC-007).

accessibility.aria_labels: role='alert' or role='status' depending on interruptiveness.

components.code_example:
<Alert color="blue" icon={<IconInfoCircle />} title="No data queried yet">
  Enter a PromQL expression to begin.
</Alert>

components.name: Empty State
components.description: Empty-state messaging implemented as a Mantine Alert Info Callout. Title + body pair — today the body often restates the title, which is the issue tracked by INC-001.

variants.name: title-only
variants.description: Recommended: single-line title, no body.
variants.mock_html:
ℹ
No alerting rules found

variants.name: title-plus-action
variants.description: Title + body that adds setup guidance or a docs link.
variants.mock_html:
ℹ
No alerting rules found
Configure alert rules in prometheus.yml under the rule_files key.

dos_and_donts.text: Always qualify 'No X found' with the specific rule type: 'No alerting rules found' vs 'No recording rules found' (INC-007).
Duplicate the title as the body (INC-001).

accessibility.screen_reader: role='status' so screen readers announce the empty state after the page loads.

components.name: Link
components.description: Mantine Anchor / plain <a>. Brand-blue color, no underline by default. Used for endpoint URLs on /targets and 'show relabeling' disclosure on /service-discovery.

variants.name: default
variants.description: Brand-blue text, no underline.

dos_and_donts.text: Add underline on :hover/:focus so the affordance is visible for users who tab through the page.
Style non-links (e.g. disclosure toggles) as links — use a <button> and Icon Button chrome instead.

accessibility.aria_labels: Use descriptive link text; avoid 'click here'.

action_items.title: Drop duplicate body on empty-state Alerts
action_items.description: Today the empty-state Alert on /alerts, /rules, and both /alertmanager-discovery cards renders the same string twice (title + body). Delete the body prop or replace it with actionable setup guidance.

before_after.after_html: Configure alert rules in prometheus.yml under the rule_files key.

action_items.github_issue_title: Empty-state Alert: drop duplicate body or replace with setup guidance

action_items.title: Promote Health Status Badge to every boolean-state field
action_items.description: Wrap every UP/DOWN/Successful/Failed/Ready field in <HealthBadge>. Today /status renders 'Configuration Reload: Successful' as plain black text so failure and success look identical at a glance.

action_items.title: Replace bare <code> with Label Badge on /tsdb-status and /flags
action_items.description: Label names on /tsdb-status and flag names on /flags render as bare <code>, while the same concept renders as a pill Label Badge on /targets. Unify on the pill form.
action_items.github_issue_title: LabelBadge: unify label/flag rendering across /tsdb-status and /flags

action_items.title: Make every Table sortable by default
action_items.description: Flip the Table wrapper default to sortable. Keep an opt-out for cases where source-order matters (Build/Runtime KV tables).
action_items.github_issue_title: Table: default to sortable columns with aria-sort

action_items.title: Unify Card title treatment — always icon + text
action_items.description: Four stacked TSDB cards plus the title-less Flags card and Card-less Config section break the page-chrome pattern established on /status and /alertmanager-discovery. Add <CardTitle icon=… /> to each and wrap Flags + Config in Card.
action_items.github_issue_title: Card titles: always lead with a Tabler icon + wrap /flags and /config

action_items.title: Stabilize highlight.js role-to-color across themes
action_items.description: YAML keys render green in light and blue in dark; strings do the opposite. Pick a stable hue per role (keys=green, strings=blue) and vary only luminance between themes.
action_items.github_issue_title: Syntax highlighting: stop swapping role→hue between themes

action_items.title: Parameterize empty-state copy per rule type
action_items.description: 'No rules found' is ambiguous when two different rule types share the string. Say 'No alerting rules found' on /alerts and 'No recording rules found' on /rules.
action_items.github_issue_title: EmptyState: qualify 'No rules found' by rule type

action_items.title: Define --font-family-mono and apply everywhere
action_items.description: pre and code currently resolve to the bare 'monospace' keyword — falls back to Courier on most OSes. Introduce a single CSS custom property with a modern stack and point every pre/code at it.

before_after.after_html:
--font-family-mono: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, 'SF Mono', Menlo, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', monospace;
pre, code { font-family: var(--font-family-mono); }

action_items.github_issue_title: Define --font-family-mono and bind pre/code to it

action_items.title: Fix Stats Badge uppercase mismatch
action_items.description: Root .mantine-Badge-root resolves to text-transform:uppercase but the inner .mantine-Badge-label overrides to none. Intent mismatches output — set text-transform:none at the root for the stats variant.
action_items.github_issue_title: StatsBadge: set text-transform:none at the root

action_items.title: Add Copy Button to the Flags table
action_items.description: Flag names and values are among the most-copied strings in the UI but /flags has no Copy Button — users hand-select cells. Mirror the /config Copy Button on each row.
action_items.github_issue_title: Flags: add Copy Button per row

action_items.title: Add focus-visible outline to Icon Buttons in the header
action_items.description: Header Icon Buttons inherit the default Mantine focus ring (faint on the slate header). Promote to a 2px brand-blue outline for keyboard users.
action_items.github_issue_title: Icon Button: stronger focus-visible outline on dark header

action_items.title: Tokenize hardcoded spacing in page layouts
action_items.description: Several page files use literal `16px`, `24px`, `8px 16px` in inline styles. Replace with the named scale (lg, xl, sm) or the layout semantics (card-padding, header-height).
action_items.github_issue_title: Replace inline px values with spacing tokens

action_items.title: Responsive review — header collapses below 768px
action_items.description: The header nav buttons and utility icons crowd on tablet widths. Introduce a burger at <768px that collapses the nav into a drawer; keep theme toggle visible.

action_items.title: Deprecate Card Title without Icon
action_items.description: Mark the variant deprecated, route call-sites through Card Title with Icon. Covered by AI-005 for /tsdb-status; this issue tracks the component-level deprecation.

before_after.after_html: export const CardTitle = ({icon, children}) => { if (!icon) console.warn('CardTitle: icon is required'); … }

action_items.title: Add aria-sort to Sortable Table headers
action_items.description: /flags sortable headers currently lack aria-sort. Screen readers announce them as plain columns.
action_items.github_issue_title: Sortable Table: emit aria-sort on th

action_items.title: Add :hover underline to Link component
action_items.description: Link renders without underline — fine for color-sighted users, fails for users who rely on non-color affordances. Underline on :hover and :focus.

before_after.after_html:
a { color: rgb(34,139,230); text-decoration: none; }
a:hover, a:focus-visible { text-decoration: underline; }

action_items.github_issue_title: Link: underline on hover and keyboard focus

action_items.title: Document the tokens.json → CSS variable mapping
action_items.description: Tokens exist in Mantine theme but are not published as a single CSS custom-property file. Emit tokens.css from tokens.json and ship it on the docs site for copy-paste consumption.

action_items.title: Introduce --doc-status-warn for pending states
action_items.description: Status scale covers ok/error/info but no 'warn' — once Alertmanager 'pending' state surfaces, there's no token ready. Add yellow-family ok-adjacent.
